sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n101101" key="suntuxiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συντῠχ-ικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n101101.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">accidental</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ὀλισθήσεις</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.611a</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">συγχυτικαί</foreign> Reiske).</sense> </entryFree>
